_metadata.description: Manufacturer FDA violations and recall history
_metadata.scoring_rule: Deductions applied based on violation severity, recency, and resolution status. See manufacture_deduction_expl.json for full scoring framework.

severity_level_definitions.CRITICAL: Class I Recalls, toxic substances, undeclared drugs - base deduction -12 to -20
severity_level_definitions.HIGH: Class II Recalls, critical CGMP failures - base deduction -10 to -12
severity_level_definitions.MODERATE: Class III Recalls, minor CGMP issues, misbranding - base deduction -3 to -8

_metadata.pipeline_integration: Used by enrichment script to apply manufacturer trust score penalties during scoring

manufacturer_violations.product: Diamond Shruumz (Infused Cones, Chocolate Bars, Gummies)
manufacturer_violations.reason: Toxic levels of muscimol causing seizures, hospitalizations, and death
manufacturer_violations.user_facing_note: ⚠️ FDA Recall F-2724 by Prophet Premium Blends for Diamond Shruumz (Infused Cones, Chocolate Bars, Gummies): Toxic levels of muscimol causing seizures, hospitalizations, and death (classification Class I Recall). Penalty: -11.5 pts.
manufacturer_violations.internal_note: Highest severity - involved death and mass illnesses; unresolved recall indicates ongoing risk

manufacturer_violations.reason: Undeclared wheat allergen
manufacturer_violations.user_facing_note: ⚠️ FDA Recall F-2839 by Dorado Nutrition for Spermidine Maximum Strength 10mg: Undeclared wheat allergen (classification Class I Recall). Penalty: -12.0 pts.
manufacturer_violations.internal_note: Allergen issue resolved but indicates quality control gaps

manufacturer_violations.reason: Contains toxic yellow oleander instead of tejocote
manufacturer_violations.user_facing_note: ⚠️ FDA Recall F-2825 by Motivate Me Ashley, LLC for VidaSlim (90-day, 30-day, 7-day, Hot Body Brew): Contains toxic yellow oleander instead of tejocote (classification Class I Recall). Penalty: -11.5 pts.
manufacturer_violations.internal_note: Toxic substitution across multiple product lines indicates intentional or severe negligence

manufacturer_violations.product: Neptune's Fix Elixir, Neptune's Fix Extra Strength Elixir, Neptune's Fix Tablets
manufacturer_violations.reason: Tianeptine ('gas station heroin') and undeclared synthetic cannabinoids — 2 deaths, 13 ICU admissions, 7 intubations
manufacturer_violations.user_facing_note: ⚠️ FDA Recall  by Neptune Resources, LLC for Neptune's Fix Elixir, Neptune's Fix Extra Strength Elixir, Neptune's Fix Tablets: Tianeptine ('gas station heroin') and undeclared synthetic cannabinoids — 2 deaths, 13 ICU admissions, 7 intubations (classification Class I Recall). Penalty: -13.0 pts.
manufacturer_violations.internal_note: One of the most dangerous supplement violations in recent years. 2 deaths, 13 ICU, 7 intubated. Product still circulating despite recall.
manufacturer_violations.source_identifier: fallback::|neptuneresourcesllc|neptune's fix elixir, neptune's fix extra strength elixir, neptune's fix tablets|tianeptine ('gas station heroin') and undeclared synthetic cannabinoids — 2 deaths, 13 icu admissions, 7 intubations|2023-11-15

manufacturer_violations.reason: DMAA (synthetic stimulant) falsely labeled as natural; fraud with fake Chinese COAs — 1 death, 2 liver transplants, 29 hepatitis cases. CEO sentenced to 60 months
manufacturer_violations.user_facing_note: ⚠️ FDA Recall  by USPLabs LLC / S.K. Laboratories Inc. for OxyElite Pro (weight loss), Jack3d (pre-workout): DMAA (synthetic stimulant) falsely labeled as natural; fraud with fake Chinese COAs — 1 death, 2 liver transplants, 29 hepatitis cases.
